rationale: Review 2's suggested fixes are circular -- fiberHomeomorph_one and fiberHomeomorph_mul are themselves derived from fiberHomeomorphMonoidHom.map_one/map_mul, so replacing those fields' proofs with the derived lemmas breaks the definition. Review 1 avoids this by proposing independent pointwise lemmas and additionally catches three more real, diff-grounded issues that Review 2 misses entirely.
